message:
feat(core,ad): add effects field to Jaxpr/Equation IR and value_and_grad API

Add an `effects` field (Vec<String>) to both `Jaxpr` and `Equation` structs
to model JAX-style effect tracking (e.g., global_io, ordered_effects). The
field uses serde `skip_serializing_if = "Vec::is_empty"` with `default` for
full backward-compatible deserialization of existing programs that lack the
field. Effects are incorporated into canonical fingerprinting so that
programs with different effect annotations produce distinct cache keys.

Introduce `value_and_grad_jaxpr()` in fj-ad which computes both the forward
output values and reverse-mode gradients in a single shared forward pass,
avoiding the redundant double-evaluation that separate `eval_jaxpr()` +
`grad_jaxpr()` calls would incur. The existing `grad_jaxpr()` is refactored
to delegate to a shared `value_and_grad_jaxpr_inner()` helper.

Derive `Hash` on `FixtureFamily` in fj-conformance for use in hash-based
fixture deduplication.

Update all 20 crate files across fj-core, fj-ad, fj-conformance,
fj-dispatch, fj-egraph, fj-interpreters, fj-trace, and proptest strategies
to initialize the new `effects: vec![]` field in every Equation literal,
ensuring compilation across the entire workspace. Add comprehensive tests
for effects serde roundtrip, backward compat with missing field, fingerprint
sensitivity, and value_and_grad correctness parity with separate paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
